name: bifrost-public-ui-quality
description: Playwright quality suite for Bifrost platform (public-ui, admin, arrangør)

scripts.quality:local: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=local-quality QUALITY_APP=all powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File quality/scripts/run-local-quality.ps1 test
scripts.quality:flows: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=local-quality QUALITY_APP=all powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File quality/scripts/run-local-quality.ps1 test quality/tests/staging
scripts.quality:flows:headed: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=local-quality QUALITY_APP=all powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File quality/scripts/run-local-quality.ps1 test quality/tests/staging --headed --workers=1
scripts.quality:flows:ui: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=local-quality QUALITY_APP=all powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File quality/scripts/run-local-quality.ps1 test quality/tests/staging --ui
scripts.quality:test: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=test QUALITY_APP=all playwright test quality/tests/smoke
scripts.quality:prod-smoke: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=production QUALITY_APP=all playwright test quality/tests/smoke
scripts.quality:screenshots: cross-env QUALITY_ENV=local-quality QUALITY_APP=all QUALITY_SCREENSHOTS=true powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File quality/scripts/run-local-quality.ps1 test
